aiCap.alertBody: Upgrade to Pantry Pro for unlimited AI, or buy 10 ops for $1.99 — they don't expire.
aiCap.genericHeadline: You've reached this month's AI cap.
aiCap.snapHeadline: Snap is an AI feature — you've reached this month's cap.
aiCap.importHeadline: URL import and Generate are AI features — you've reached this month's cap.
aiCap.blockBody: The {{cap}} free ops reset on the 1st of next month. Pantry Pro lifts the cap and adds unlimited AI.

recipeCap.alertBody: Free accounts hold up to {{cap}} recipes you've created. Recipes saved from Discover don't count. Pantry Pro lifts the cap and removes every other limit.
